descriptionHtml:
Formosa 47 for sale 1984 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

Formosa 47 for sale 1984 — a well-kept passagemaking yacht offered in good condition. She will provide you the comfort and the peace of mind of a proven ocean‑crossing capable sailing yacht. She has always been maintained with care and is equipped with everything needed to sail safely and live aboard autonomously and comfortably for long periods.

(Autopilot, Radar, GPS, Fresh Watermaker, Generator, Inverter, Solar Panel, Tender, Davits...)

Principal specifications

  • Length overall: 14.33 m
  • Beam: 4.27 m
  • Draft: 1.83 m

Main equipment

  • VHF Navicom RT1050N2K AIS (DSC + GPS)
  • Mobile VHF Cobra Marine H600 DSC + GPS
  • Garmin GPS map 86i
  • Bow thruster
  • Autopilot with remote controller
  • Depth meter
  • Wind meter (direction, real speed, relative speed)
  • Charts plotter
  • Davits (150 kg)
  • Radar
  • Radar reflector
  • Excell II 30 kg anchor
  • Windlass with 2 remote controllers
  • 2 x 50 Ah Gel motor batteries + 2 x 50 Ah Gel windlass/bow thruster batteries
  • 6 inflatable life jackets (automatic)

Autonomy and systems

  • Two water tanks, 500 litres each (total 1000 litres).
  • Two fuel tanks, 400 litres each (total 800 litres).
  • Three solar panels (750 W total) with two Victron BMS (Bluetooth).
  • Two Lithium Ion house batteries (total 600 Ah).
  • Victron 3 kW Multiplus II Charger/Inverter (220 V).
  • Victron DC‑DC converter to recharge service batteries while motoring.
  • Hot water available for showers and galley.
  • 220 V outlets throughout the boat.

Engine and tender

  • Volvo Penta 150 CV diesel (2800 hours), inspected and serviced annually; engine is in good condition.
  • Included tender: 2.7 m dinghy, only 25 kg (3–4 persons).
  • Included outboard: Elite electric motor 500 W (9 kg; 750 W max; ~10 km range in normal conditions).
  • A 3 m paddle board is included.

Maintenance and recent works

  • Standing rigging (including chain plates) changed in 2023.
  • Running rigging renewed in 2022.
  • All four sails professionally cleaned and refurbished in 2022.
  • Engine routinely serviced yearly by professionals; diesel hours: 2700.
  • Electrical and energy systems updated to support off‑grid living.

This Formosa 47 for sale 1984 is presented in good condition and is ready for serious cruising. If you would like more details, survey history, or to arrange an inspection, Contact US to help you organize the next steps.
